common_phrase_readings.phrase: 与其坐而待亡，孰若起而拯之

common_phrase_readings.displayed_phrase_pinyin: chē dào shānqián bì yǒu lù
zhǐ cǐ yī jiā bié wú fēn diàn

common_phrase_readings.phrase: 只许州官放火，不许百姓点灯
common_phrase_readings.displayed_phrase_pinyin: zhǐ xǔ zhōuguān fàng huǒ,bù xǔ bǎixìng diǎn dēng
yǒu fú tóng xiǎng,yǒu nàn tóng dāng
dīng shì dīng mǎo shì mǎo

common_phrase_readings.phrase: 若要人不知，除非己莫为
common_phrase_readings.displayed_phrase_pinyin: ruòyào rén bù zhī,chúfēi jǐ mòwéi

common_phrase_readings.phrase: 哈巴儿，哈巴狗，哈叭狗，哈吧狗
踏破铁鞋无觅处，得来全不费工夫
common_phrase_readings.displayed_phrase_pinyin: tà pòtiěxié wú mì chù,délái quán bù fèi gōngfu
